title: Indicators operator state (overlay)
description: Per-indicator operator-set flags. The CITIZEN-facing indicator artifact (datasets/indicators/in/**/*.json, schema v4.0+) carries the data only. Operator state — `frozen`, `refetch_requested`, `unavailable_periods` — lives here as a sparse overlay keyed by indicator id under `indicators`. The planner reads this file; the rip migration tool seeds it from prior in-artifact values. Hand-editable (sparingly).

x-changelog.description: Initial schema. Sparse overlay: only indicators with at least one non-default operator flag appear under `indicators`. Per ADR-0026 (inventory lifted out of indicator artifact).

indicators.description: Map of indicator id → operator-flag overlay. Sparse: only indicators with at least one flag set appear.

frozen.description: When true, the planner skips this indicator entirely on the next collect run.

refetch_requested.description: When true, the planner re-runs the bulk for this indicator's source on the next collect; the planner clears the flag to false after a successful re-collect.

unavailable_periods.description: Structured cells or whole periods excluded because the source does not publish them or the cell cannot exist (e.g. Ladakh in Census 2011).
